context: Tests whether the agent can scaffold a Rails engine extraction by creating the correct file structure, applying isolate_namespace, re-namespacing all classes under Reporting::, and producing a valid gemspec.

checklist.name: Engine directory created
checklist.description: The engines/reporting/ directory structure is created with lib/ and app/ subdirectories

checklist.name: lib/reporting/engine.rb created
checklist.description: engines/reporting/lib/reporting/engine.rb exists and contains a class that inherits from Rails::Engine with isolate_namespace Reporting

checklist.name: lib/reporting.rb entry point
checklist.description: engines/reporting/lib/reporting.rb exists and requires the engine and version

checklist.name: Report model re-namespaced
checklist.description: app/models/reporting/report.rb exists with class Reporting::Report < ApplicationRecord (not Report < ApplicationRecord)

checklist.name: gemspec created
checklist.description: A reporting.gemspec file is created with name, version, and required_ruby_version fields

checklist.name: frozen_string_literal in all files
checklist.description: All Ruby files in the engine include # frozen_string_literal: true

checklist.name: YARD class-level comments
checklist.description: At least the model and controller files have a minimal YARD class-level comment

checklist.name: isolate_namespace present
checklist.description: The engine.rb file calls isolate_namespace Reporting
